name: Dean Browning
subject: The Hypocrisy
body:
The FAKE NEWS MEDIA is at it again!
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I am sure you are aware of the events at the United States Capitol building this past Wednesday. Hundreds of thousands of patriots stood together to support President Donald J. Trump and to voice their opposition to the Radical Left STEALING THE 2020 ELECTION. This protest was peaceful and orderly until a few bad actors decided to cause trouble by breaking into the Capitol building. CSSPAC will never condone violence, rioting, or looting. Our position is that anyone who instigated or participated in any unlawful act must be arrested and prosecuted. Period! But the way the media is portraying these events is hypocritical at the least. While the lying liberal media portrayed the ANTIFA movement and the BLM riots and as "peaceful and necessary", they label us Patriots as thugs and criminals. It is clear that the media and this entire election is biased towards the Radical Left and Washington Establishment. The media fears losing control of their power, and they will do anything to cling on to that to control and censure Americans who dare to disagree. They even went so far as to label a U.S. Air Force veteran who served in Iraq as a "domestic terrorist" after being shot and killed by Capitol Police. This needs to end. NOW! Patriots across America need to come together peacefully and STAND UP to the hypocrisy and blatant cheating perpetrated by the mainstream media. I urge you to sign our petition to break up the liberal media conglomerates.
---

For Freedom,

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: What next? Outlining the next steps in the immediate future
body:
| |
---
Since our last communication on Thursday, we have learned of the death of Capitol Police Officer Brian D. Sicknick, and we have learned that Capitol Police officer Howard Liebengood died off duty. We mourn the loss of life of these brave men whose duty and responsibility were to guard the Capitol building and those who work inside. Last Wednesday’s events at the doors of and inside the Capitol left us shocked, outraged, and saddened. Anyone who broke the law to enter the Capitol, cause the destruction of property, or the loss of Officer Sicknick’s life must be arrested and held accountable.

We revere our Constitution precisely because it created a framework that allows for the resolution of political conflict in a peaceful manner. What we saw Wednesday at the door and inside of the Capitol was a violation of that framework. _That is not who any of you are, and not what our organization is about._ We condemn the unlawful actions is the strongest terms.
|
---
Many are asking what is next? What should we do? How do we continue to stand for our values? Many are frustrated at the hypocrisy from the media and the radical left. You may be wondering what difference does any of it make if our vote does not count.

After talking to our local leaders on Sunday night and reading emails from you, here is what we recommend for the next steps in the immediate future.
1. **Remember**
2. **Restraint**
3. **Regroup, reassess, reply**
4. **Realize**

**Remember our values and remember why we do what we do.**
Remember we stand for personal freedom, economic freedom, and a debt free future. Remember, also, we appreciate and voted for Donald Trump because he puts America and Americans first. That is why we worked as hard as we did to ensure that every legal vote was counted, and every illegal vote was rejected. Re-read the Constitution. It is precisely in times like these that we need to work within the framework of the Constitution and use the guardrails it provides to maintain a civil society.

**Pause and exercise restraint**.
While the First Amendment guarantees our God-given right to peaceably assemble, to speak freely, and to petition our government for redress of our grievances, it does not command us to engage in such activity all the time. **To anyone who is thinking of showing up at a protest around the country in the next two weeks, please stay home.** Now is the time for cooler heads to prevail.

This request might not make sense to you, or might even anger you. We are an activist organization, after all. Why would we be counseling against activity? We understand your frustration, anger, fear for the future, and sense of hopelessness. Those emotions continue to roll through us, too. Like you, we know there is a time and a place for everything. Right now is not the time to up the ante. Calmer heads must prevail. We have a dozen years of showing how to make our voices heard peacefully. Over the years, there have been times to protest, times to melt the phone lines, times to get out the vote, and times when we reserve our energy because we see the writing on the wall. Now is such a time to reserve energy.

Here is why: **There are people outside our organization who want to instigate crowds for one nefarious reason or another.** Those individuals’ actions result in chaos and create situations that can be used to excuse powerful government overreach to control our lives. Neither you nor I want to or will take their bait.

We cannot look to others to be the ones to lead our country at the moment. The leaders we need to set examples for when and how to peacefully protest and stand for liberty are in your mirrors. Lead by example, and show others we not only know _how_ but also _when_ to engage.

**Regroup, reassess, and reply.**
Use the next two weeks to reflect on how Tea Party Patriots Action can better reach our goals, how you would suggest we approach election integrity, how can we better stand against the unconstitutional, un-American legislation that is sure to come out of Congress in the next 100+ days.

We are not giving up, and we are not giving in. We see how the radical left is trying to take advantage of the current unstable environment to press their agenda forward. We oppose their efforts to impeach President Trump. We oppose their efforts to silence and remove Members of Congress who used the Constitution and the law to make known their concerns over election integrity. We oppose Big Tech’s determination to silence conservative voices.

There are still things we can do peacefully _**within the system**_. We are working on an action plan for the next two years. These plans will include work to ensure the integrity of future elections, training future leaders so we can be wiser and more effective, and educating Americans on the harms of socialism and the radical left’s socialist agenda. Before finalizing such a plan, we want to hear from you.

**Reply to this email to share ideas or suggestions** for how to you would like to see us regroup, what lessons we can learn to improve, and what ideas you have for how we can continue to work within the Constitutional and legal framework to achieve our goals.

**Realize we will be victorious.**
We can have confidence in this because the left is overplaying its hand, and ultimately the American people will reject this.

We can have confidence in our victory because history shows that in America, liberty prevails. Our nation is going through a difficult time. America has weathered similar social and political unrest in the past, and we are confident we will get through our current troubles as well. And why wouldn’t we? We are Americans. We are the heirs to the Founding Fathers, whose gift to us – the Constitution of the United States – is the greatest framework for self-governance ever devised.

As Winston Churchill said, “Never, never, never, never – in nothing, great or small, large or petty – never give in, except to convictions of honour and good sense.” Hold fast to our honorable convictions, and exercise good sense in the coming days.
|
---
We appreciate all you do, and all you have done, and – perhaps most importantly – all you will do, to help us stand for the Constitution. We are grateful that we have such committed supporters, and we pledge to you once again that we will continue to do all we can to promote the principles of individual liberty and Constitutionally limited government.

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin and the Tea Party Patriots Action Support Team

| | Friends-

On National Law Enforcement Appreciation Day, I posted a video thanking the brave men and women who serve and protect our community because it’s important to recognize the people who put their lives on the line to keep us safe.

That’s why I’m introducing legislation in the House of Representatives to stop state and local governments from raiding federal funds for police departments.

Socialist Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez doesn’t see it that way. She took offense to my support for the police, but I won't give one inch.

AOC’s the architect of the Defund the Police movement, so it’s no wonder that she’s started publicly attacking me for my commitment to law enforcement. I take it as a badge of honor that she disagrees with me.

clean_body: Friends, As the only Republican representing New York City in Congress, I will stand strong against one-party Democrat rule which has led to crime rates soaring, career criminals let loose on the city and $1 billion being slashed from the NYPD budget. | | | | | | Friends- On National Law Enforcement Appreciation Day, I posted a video thanking the brave men and women who serve and protect our community because it’s important to recognize the people who put their lives on the line to keep us safe. That’s why I’m introducing legislation in the House of Representatives to stop state and local governments from raiding federal funds for police departments. Socialist Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez doesn’t see it that way. She took offense to my support for the police, but I won't give one inch. AOC’s the architect of the Defund the Police movement, so it’s no wonder that she’s started publicly attacking me for my commitment to law enforcement. I take it as a badge of honor that she disagrees with me. | | | | | | | | | | We have to do everything in our power to keep our heroes safe. I won’t stand for AOC’s lies and attacks against the men and women who sacrifice everything to protect us every day—and neither should you. body:
It's now been nine weeks since Election Day, and there is no winner in my congressional race. | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c55bf78a9996405eb099b51315cf9933&_e=PNzOBnGmayAIi-yjJykYXgWuUJaRMep3Dz1Ug9XfUddSEaYY0uYBVOh50P4MJRdAiqPK3sM4YNstDNXV951B7-ATfcSKdVbHDNho54BYLt5_QigHerCuYNXhxuR84k2z-ZawYkwslckaaxD1yabb8FwhNqic5vuukXKnVHCX8gjpp_ilWoUlpa02-XVMFBF2gk1KNulrvph7owTErTkf0AbZhjtYTrpSzuRGCuMKZp4Ng5afvz7WfU9E4ufCAvm9ePDxLNnatNPywvj0v77DlMMpl46fyCzeCstKNv0qAJy3MoB6tkHUKgYwfWm2Tls5dMzrhGOpLdSvapywMvEgyp4BG4HuoOZefT_SLOwKgiWpD9bGJWD3zVZfe7JfVR4BXg9zRmkLx_a5QFFoAZFCsNyFLRrO00KQsu-jrVXT970eCsHdob8mWqVuIqrc2gRn)

Fellow American,

It’s Claudia Tenney, Republican nominee in New York's 22nd Congressional District, reaching out once again to let you know that my race has still yet to be called – more than **NINE weeks after Election Day**.

We’ve been in court arguing our case to the New York Supreme Court judge overseeing our race for months now. We could get a verdict any day, or we could see the partial recount in the race continue for several more weeks -- even another month. It’s anyone’s guess.

| [NY-22 Recount Fund
Chip-In Today⇒](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c55bf78a9996405eb099b51315cf9933&_e=PNzOBnGmayAIi-yjJykYXgWuUJaRMep3Dz1Ug9XfUddSEaYY0uYBVOh50P4MJRdAiqPK3sM4YNstDNXV951B7-ATfcSKdVbHDNho54BYLt5_QigHerCuYNXhxuR84k2z-ZawYkwslckaaxD1yabb8FwhNqic5vuukXKnVHCX8gjpp_ilWoUlpa02-XVMFBF2gk1KNulrvph7owTErTkf0AbZhjtYTrpSzuRGCuMKZp7sFH40bmLk4g5pX2bGQqffSexX8wnCdjLZb91EG8pvRDs6wNSrNMXvDzy_3wZ11hgfn-HvcHEkjwPLJerK6yA4oIKfnxl7al6UfuS_GzF-7afFcLJWK65QTUBvY-tttYOPbipdQKQ03AzDFWMcwiZ7KI4weHNoDs0d2Z6Jw8mZr_wipuLq6ysTqOconziJMhv0rCHPYD6DihPms1xzYP4i)
---

With the new Congress having been sworn-in last week, Republican leaders in DC are counting on me to prevail in my race and become the 212th Republican seated in the U.S. House. Should I be declared the victor in NY-22, **Republicans would be just SIX seats shy of taking back the House next year**.

If we’ve learned anything over the course of the past nine weeks, it’s that _**every vote counts; every race counts**_.

With the campaign having gone on nine weeks longer than anyone expected, we’ve run out of money to pay our mounting attorneys’ fees. **[Our campaign’s financial situation has become even more dire since my team sent out a note last week asking for your help to raise $10,000, that at the time would have paid off our legal debts](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c55bf78a9996405eb099b51315cf9933&_e=PNzOBnGmayAIi-yjJykYXgWuUJaRMep3Dz1Ug9XfUddSEaYY0uYBVOh50P4MJRdAiqPK3sM4YNstDNXV951B7-ATfcSKdVbHDNho54BYLt5_QigHerCuYNXhxuR84k2z-ZawYkwslckaaxD1yabb8FwhNqic5vuukXKnVHCX8gjpp_ilWoUlpa02-XVMFBF2gk1KNulrvph7owTErTkf0AbZhjtYTrpSzuRGCuMKZp54UEZu0auLyLLMoxENgqRySO_5KyO9sqQAWtowbCWNcnTk_ZzOWBVefvZOsrrNeTtTwe7EchxpJMAO4ttGDQZXLh1vdc6OQ7nmgBUazt7vXIfxchj9_rPIScJ8AMLlJ6j_VeaTFCuiGipWQSL5jqMy09pu7HeW2leh21TCX080Zq7Y-yKnbPNgDln2k85xZEiRdnt3Px8bHvX0nOVzp1zL)**. Not only did we fail to raise the money to pay our attorneys last week – we’ve now incurred another week’s worth of expenses.

Won’t you consider **[a small donation of $5, $22, $50 or $100 or more today](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c55bf78a9996405eb099b51315cf9933&_e=PNzOBnGmayAIi-yjJykYXgWuUJaRMep3Dz1Ug9XfUddSEaYY0uYBVOh50P4MJRdAiqPK3sM4YNstDNXV951B7-ATfcSKdVbHDNho54BYLt5_QigHerCuYNXhxuR84k2z-ZawYkwslckaaxD1yabb8FwhNqic5vuukXKnVHCX8gjpp_ilWoUlpa02-XVMFBF2gk1KNulrvph7owTErTkf0AbZhjtYTrpSzuRGCuMKZp4RIGf_Q7xesFlOhWsDRcXCBZEKhSGrOLM9g07TPYfDXCWNrGdyug8SSeAA0L00jd1bnHtbIvPHrJ8GRl1mYzQYA350oviX6_pDifXj85OWXKUr_nG5GD0MMV6qRCHSVykTeMRxAeJ-Lyw4kpXAX16ctgJfhExHCFGLleq8QgyszhM-F1a-_pPXybHNgl8yYs1NYTJB_wE_-611_PfotnNC)** to help my campaign continue to afford the best legal representation?

[NY-22 Recount Fund
Chip-In Today⇒](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c55bf78a9996405eb099b51315cf9933&_e=PNzOBnGmayAIi-yjJykYXgWuUJaRMep3Dz1Ug9XfUddSEaYY0uYBVOh50P4MJRdAiqPK3sM4YNstDNXV951B7-ATfcSKdVbHDNho54BYLt5_QigHerCuYNXhxuR84k2z-ZawYkwslckaaxD1yabb8FwhNqic5vuukXKnVHCX8gjpp_ilWoUlpa02-XVMFBF2gk1KNulrvph7owTErTkf0AbZhjtYTrpSzuRGCuMKZp6iqqMI8V7cM6eK36oVmT1rxYkt48f5hOHNRb_05ZLd8x2GRCeA-5hMJwGc5PYpHs8RhjDkT8seIxIZoUtBqP1PcyfkACS2GqEZcpp1K5qdcwIYq_7V5sfaIFwWzS4eAZ7iMNYHxSHDkdDcNkfdfJ5a_PoqG3eVY03flKO-tOERUtUfN_ozVGvVmh6mcDUo9zkm3EKL95rSvVBh5RVRtVzg)
---

To cede ground to my Democrat opponent, or worse yet, lose the recount because we couldn’t afford to keep our legal team in place would be a travesty.

We are paying our legal fees on a weekly basis and **[desperately need to raise $10,000 by _**Wednesday evening**_ to keep current on this week’s bills](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c55bf78a9996405eb099b51315cf9933&_e=PNzOBnGmayAIi-yjJykYXgWuUJaRMep3Dz1Ug9XfUddSEaYY0uYBVOh50P4MJRdAiqPK3sM4YNstDNXV951B7-ATfcSKdVbHDNho54BYLt5_QigHerCuYNXhxuR84k2z-ZawYkwslckaaxD1yabb8FwhNqic5vuukXKnVHCX8gjpp_ilWoUlpa02-XVMFBF2gk1KNulrvph7owTErTkf0AbZhjtYTrpSzuRGCuMKZp7kfCbM_O-IoV5iqoMHr7uj2sHAmkRpEErCZ0xg_VpDMiwNQjUEENm_2dLT4jNGA50cwIoP0mkFO5Jvzm0WWUtZhA5LzDRC2himwGFMpQVosY5f3aVLCcUTdCaS7NKtloQXU8bZ-TjftLIKoAbJtZPVcPMsgNVNyoFvPu6_UGNeMLA3AWeu93S9O0PM4x2phQVw1d3IfOypg7oMvE-cFAHk)**. Any donation you’re able to make today would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for all your support,
